mapper.select: select K.id, C.category, K.trade_date as tradeDate, K.amount, K.homeru, K.memo, K.created_at as createdAt, K.updated_at as updatedAt from kakeibo K left join category C on K.category_id = C.id order by K.trade_date desc
select count(*) from kakeibo where username = #{username}

select K.id, K.category_id as categoryId, C.category, K.trade_date as tradeDate, K.amount, K.homeru, K.memo, C.in_out as inOut, K.created_at as createdAt, K.updated_at as updatedAt from kakeibo K left join category C on K.category_id = C.id where K.id = #{id}

select K.id, C.category, K.trade_date as tradeDate, K.amount, K.homeru, K.memo, C.in_out as inOut, K.soft_delete as softDelete, K.created_at as createdAt, K.updated_at as updatedAt from kakeibo K left join category C on K.category_id = C.id where K.trade_date between make_date(#{year},#{month}, #{day}) and make_date(#{year},#{month}, #{day}) + interval '1 month' - interval '1 day' and K.username = #{username} order by K.trade_date desc
select payday from users where username = #{username}
select max(trade_date) as newestData, min(trade_date) as oldestData from kakeibo
select id, category, in_out as inOut,sort_order as sortOrder from category
mapper.insert: insert into kakeibo(username, category_id, amount, memo, trade_date, homeru) values (#{username}, #{categoryId}, #{amount}, #{memo}, #{tradeDate}, #{homeru})
mapper.update: update kakeibo set soft_delete = #{delete} where id = #{id}

update kakeibo set trade_date = #{kakeibo.tradeDate}, category_id = #{kakeibo.categoryId}, amount = #{kakeibo.amount}, memo = #{kakeibo.memo}, homeru = #{kakeibo.homeru}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
